data_quality_notes: Exact proxy (area of habitat in patches > minimum viable size) unavailable via standard APIs — requires GIS raster processing. Substituted with World Bank 'Forest area (% of land area)' (code: AG.LND.FRST.ZS) as an approximate proxy for habitat availability. Forest area % captures broad habitat availability but does NOT capture fragmentation specifically. This is an exploratory test using an imperfect proxy. Approach 1: WRI URL was an article page. Approach 2: No local fragmentation indicators found. Approach 3: World Bank searches did not yield fragmentation metrics; fell back to forest area %.
summary: Using 'Forest area (% of land area)' as approximate proxy for habitat availability (not fragmentation per se). Bivariate: Pearson r=0.158 (p=0.0000), Spearman rho=0.168. Partial r=0.159 (p=0.0000) controlling for log(GDP/capita). Best functional form: quadratic. Verdict: partially_confirmed. Note: proxy does not capture habitat fragmentation geometry; only broad forest area coverage.

proxy_substitution.requested: Area of Habitat Remaining within Fragmented Landscape Patches
proxy_substitution.rationale: Forest area % is the most accessible proxy for habitat availability; does not capture fragmentation geometry
